description: Power of attorney. In Judaeo-Arabic. Location: Fustat. Dated: Middle third of Iyyar 14[.]3 Seleucid. The tens digit may have still been preserved at the time of Worman, who read it as 1463 Seleucid, which is 1152 CE. Aharon ha-Kohen b. [...] Pe'er ha-Kohanim appoints Abū Saʿd al-Ṣabbāgh al-[...] b. Avraham (ZL) as his agent in suing Abū l-Ḥasan Yefet b. Tiqva to repay the 195.5 dirhams that he owes Aharon. Signed: Natan ha-Kohen b. Shemuel (ZL); Tiqva b. Simḥa b. Mevasser ha-Ḥaver; Mevorakh b. Natan. The qiyyum (validation) is signed by Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen b. Yosef (ZL); Menaḥem b. Berakhot (ZL); and Hillel b. Ṣadoq (ZL) Av Bet Din. (Though this last signature is oriented at 90 degrees in the margin.)
description_he: ייפוי כוח; ביהודית-ערבית; מקום: פסטאט; תאריך: אמצע אייר 14[.]3 לשטרות = 1152 לספירה לפי וורמן; אהרון הכהן בן פאר הכהנים ממנה שליח לתבוע 195.5 דרהם מיפת בן תקוה
